title: [Cobblemon] Pokemon Sunset Orange
description: The official fakemon addon of Jetsetter24!
body:
# Explore Founlos!

This addon exists as a way for me to practice animation and modelling entire fakemon.

Attached is a document that contains the stats, types, abilities and names for every pokemon, alongside sneakpeaks for what I have planned.

What pokemon are in the pack? There is:
<details>
<summary>Mons and Obtainment</summary>

Magmecko: rare in jungle biomes

Celebird: several forms in several locations, explore and find them all! (uncommon)

Clocknid: common in villages at night

Granclocknid: Clocknid at lvl 35

Timothy: rare in villages

Calfleur: spawns around cherry logs (uncommon)

Frogoob: common near water at day (more common in sunflower plains)

Frogirly: Frogoob with high friendship

Twigsy: uncommon in forests

Dumplazy: uncommon in villages

Phoryu: Dumplazy at lvl 33

Phomenryu: Phoryu at lvl 56

Notini: rare in the end

Cubble: uncommon in glacial biomes, frozen oceans and snowy tundras

Tsursameal: Cubble at lvl 40

Spudding: uncommon everywhere

Batorch: common in the nether or at night

Discadore: use the Kings Rock on Luvdisc

Altelios: ultra-rare in mountains
  
</details>

Not every pokemon in the addon have completed lines - evolutions will be coming in the future!

![The first five final evolutions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eef1f61f5b6b1218af7af66c8d07f106b6a953f7_0.webp)

this addon is not to be used on public servers without my permission - please message me on discord if you wish to feature my addon!!

You are free to use my addon in any youtube videos or posts online, however all credit MUST be given to me and this page must be listed.
